title: drosera spatulata var. spatulata
intro: Drosera spatulata var. spatulata, also known as the spatulate sundew, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the Droseraceae family. It contains medicinal properties, including iridoid glycosides and flavonoids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. This plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as coughs, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, offering potential health benefits in improving respiratory function and reducing inflammation. Drosera spatulata var. spatulata can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, allowing for a convenient and accessible way to harness its medicinal properties.
